Off Calendar Jan-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
F. Gale Connor, Esq., from Nossaman LLP, 415-398-3600, for Plaintiff and moving party

No other Appearance. Tentative Ruling is adopted.
PLAINTIFF KARLEEN RUDOLPH Notice Of Motion For Award Of Reasonable Attorneys' Fees IS Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Defendant's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar and dissolved/Fee paid. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-27-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. F. GALE CONNOR OF NOSSAMAN LLP, TEL. NO. 398-3600 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JOHN WASWORTH, TEL. NO. 730-8917 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF KARLEEN RUDOLPH'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. Plaintiff satisfied her burden of production and defendant did not present any evidence creating a triable issue on any element of plaintiff's claim for breach of the promissory note or on any affirmative defense. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Nichole Rodich, CSR # 11604 = (302/HEK)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-20-2011 Continued To Oct-27-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
F. Gale Connor, Esq., from Nossaman LLP, 415-398-3600, for Plaintiff and moving party
John Wadsworth, Esq., Law Office, 415-730-8917, for Defendant and opposing party

Argued and the Court vacated its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF KARLEEN RUDOLPH'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is continued to 10/27/11, opposition tomorrow by the end of the day.
Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
